issues.comment: Variable organization_context is undefined but referenced in organization_context.member.has_global_access, causing NameError when optimized pagination is requested.
When cursor.is_prev is True, start_offset can be negative (offset value), but Django QuerySet slicing does not support negative start indices, causing TypeError on queryset[negative_start:stop].
Line allows cursor.offset to be negative and uses it as start_offset in queryset[start_offset:stop], but Django QuerySet slicing does not support negative start indices, causing TypeError.
Method self._is_asc(for_prev) is called but _is_asc method is not defined in OptimizedCursorPaginator class, causing AttributeError.

organization_context.member.has_global_access references undefined variable 'organization_context' but should reference 'organization' (which is the method parameter), causing NameError at runtime when optimized pagination is requested.
